content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented the remaining prompt-contract hardening for bead `ralph-burning-9ni.6.1`. In `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs` I normalized colon-suffixed bead-description section labels so forms like `## Non-goals:` and `## Acceptance Criteria:` are recognized, expanded extracted section-item parsing to split ordered markdown lists (`1. ...`, `2. ...`) as distinct canonical bullets, and tightened plain-label subsection detection so only standalone multiword labels end an active embedded `Non-goals` or `Acceptance Criteria` block. I also changed canonical prompt rendering to indent raw `Must-Do Scope` body lines, which keeps bead-description example headings like `## Review Policy` or `## Milestone Summary` inspectable without colliding with canonical contract validation. Added deterministic unit coverage for each amendment plus create-from-bead context validation paths.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the bead prompt renderer, section parser, and contract validator behavior for the four pending amendments around subsection boundaries, embedded canonical headings, ordered lists, and colon-suffixed markdown headings.
2. [Completed] Patch `service.rs` to normalize trailing-colon section labels, split ordered-list items, tighten plain-label subsection boundaries, and indent raw `Must-Do Scope` body lines so embedded canonical-looking headings stay inside the section body.
3. [Completed] Add deterministic regressions in `tests/unit/project_run_record_test.rs` for the new parsing/rendering cases and rerun focused formatting plus create-from-bead prompt tests.

## Validation Evidence

- Ran `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo fmt --all` successfully.
- Ran `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo test render_bead_task_prompt -- --nocapture` successfully, including the new single-word-label and colon-suffixed ordered-list regressions.
- Ran `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo test create_project_from_bead_context -- --nocapture` successfully, including the new must-do heading and colon-suffixed ordered-list bootstrap regressions.
- Ran `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo test rendered_bead_task_prompt_indents_heading_like_lines_inside_must_do_scope -- --nocapture` successfully.
- Ran `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo test project_create_from_bead_preserves_description_only_acceptance_criteria_and_hardening_notes -- --nocapture` successfully to confirm the CLI create-from-bead path still preserves description-only acceptance criteria and must-do hardening notes.

## Outstanding Risks

- Plain-label subsection boundaries are still heuristic: after this change, single-word labels such as `Scope:` or `Notes:` following a blank line intentionally stay inside the active embedded section unless expressed as markdown headings, so genuinely new one-word subsections will not split sections automatically.
- I ran focused formatting and prompt-contract regression coverage, not the full repository test suite.
- The workspace still contains the pre-existing untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory, which I left untouched.
